---
title: "Hands-on Exercise 4"
page-layout: custom
---

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

::::::::::::: tech-stack-row
::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
1
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX04/images/ho_ex04a_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 4-A]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX04/HO_EX04A.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
2
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX04/images/ho_ex04b_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 4-B]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX04/HO_EX04B.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
3
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX04/images/ho_ex04c_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 4-C]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX04/HO_EX04C.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::

::::::: gallery-item
::: huge-number
4
:::

::::: poster-card
::: {.poster style="background-image: url('HO_EX/HO_EX04/images/ho_ex04d_poster.png');"}
:::

::: poster-info
[Hands-on Exercise 4-D]{.poster-label}
:::

<a href="/HO_EX/HO_EX04/HO_EX04D.html" class="stretched-link"></a>
:::::
:::::::
:::::::::::::
